title: A Man's Home
writer: Edmund Breese, Edward J. Montagne, Anna Steese Richardson
actors: Harry T. Morey, Kathlyn Williams, Faire Binney
plot: Frederick Osborn is too busy to tend to his family duties and his wife Frances feels neglected. But Frederick's attention is caught when his wife takes up with a pair of companions to whom she is devoted, but whom he sees as more ...
